data.content: Implemented ReTakes detail expansion: added step rendering support (when metadata is present), preserved 6-line clamp with hover-to-expand, and broadened agent detail badges for steps/notes/handoffs. Threaded possible knot step arrays into Beat.metadata as knotsSteps, and added backend coverage assertions. Landed on main as ff719b7, pushed to origin/main. Gates: lint (warnings-only baseline), tsc pass, tests pass, build fails due pre-existing Next prerender/providers issue unrelated to this change.
